summary: Frontend testing of Persona Bar UI repair: All 7 tests PASSED. Bar now correctly appears only when persona explicitly selected, EXIT button removes bar completely, and state persists correctly across navigation and refresh.

minor.issue: 404 errors for some user avatars - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: PersonaContext.js: isPersonaBarActive state correctly controls bar visibility
PersonaContext.js: exitPersonaMode() properly clears localStorage keys 'activePersona' and 'isPersonaBarActive'
PersonaMaskBanner.js line 32: Correct conditional 'if (!isGodMode || !isPersonaBarActive) return null' ensures bar only shows when BOTH conditions are true
PersonaSwitcher.js line 17-20: handleExitToDefault correctly calls exitPersonaMode() for God Mode (Default) selection
All components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Persona Bar UI fix verified: (1) Bar hidden by default on /feed and /admin, (2) Bar only appears when persona explicitly selected via PersonaSwitcher dropdown, (3) Hot-switching personas works via banner dropdown, (4) EXIT button completely removes bar and clears localStorage, (5) State persists correctly across navigation and page refresh.

bar_hidden_by_default.description: No persona bar visible on /feed after login - correctly hidden

bar_not_triggered_by_admin_page.description: Visiting /admin does NOT trigger persona bar - God Mode enabled but bar remains hidden

bar_appears_on_persona_selection.description: Selecting 'Surfer' from PersonaSwitcher dropdown triggers cyan bar at top showing 'VIEWING AS: 🏄 SURFER'

banner_dropdown_hot_switch.description: Clicking dropdown in bar allows hot-switching to other personas (Shaper tested) - bar stays visible with updated persona

navigation_persistence.description: Navigating from /admin to /feed maintains persona bar visibility with correct persona displayed

exit_button_removes_bar.description: Clicking EXIT button completely removes bar from DOM - no remnants visible

refresh_maintains_hidden_state.description: After EXIT, refreshing page keeps bar hidden - localStorage correctly cleared
